summary: Raw Material Stock Bug Fixes Verified - Both issues fixed: 1) Multiple purchases for same material on same day now work without 'already exists' error, 2) Edit/Delete buttons now appear for Purchase entries in the ledger view

issues: Delete confirmation dialog has yellow background - consider using white/slate for consistency with app design

passed_tests: Backend: Add first purchase for SMP on 2026-03-24 - SUCCESS
Backend: Add second purchase for SMP on same day (2026-03-24) - SUCCESS (no 'already exists' error)
Backend: Add third purchase for SMP on same day - SUCCESS
Backend: Ledger API returns entry_id field for Purchase transactions - VERIFIED
Backend: Batch Usage transactions do NOT have entry_id - VERIFIED
Backend: Edit purchase entry via PUT /api/raw-material-stock/{id} - SUCCESS
Backend: Delete purchase entry via DELETE /api/raw-material-stock/{id} - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Purchase button opens form - SUCCESS
Frontend: Multiple purchases on same day (2026-03-27) created without error - SUCCESS
Frontend: Edit buttons (pencil icon) appear for Purchase rows in ledger - VERIFIED
Frontend: Delete buttons (trash icon) appear for Purchase rows in ledger - VERIFIED
Frontend: Edit button opens 'Edit Purchase Entry' form with pre-filled data - SUCCESS
Frontend: Delete button shows ConfirmDialog with Cancel/Delete options - SUCCESS
Frontend: Batch Usage rows do NOT have edit/delete buttons - VERIFIED (correct behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created test purchases for SMP on dates 2026-03-24, 2026-03-25, 2026-03-26, 2026-03-27 - all cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Raw Material Stock page bug fixes verified. Key changes: 1) Backend removed unique constraint on (material_name, date) in create_raw_material_stock endpoint allowing multiple purchases per day, 2) Backend added 'entry_id' field to purchase transactions in raw-material-ledger report, 3) Frontend added Actions column with Edit/Delete buttons for Purchase type rows only (Batch Usage rows correctly have no action buttons). The edit/delete buttons use data-testid attributes: edit-purchase-{entry_id} and delete-purchase-{entry_id}.

reported_bugs.issue: Cannot add purchase for same material on same day - error: 'Stock entry already exists for SMP on 2026-03-24'
reported_bugs.verification: Successfully added 3 purchases for SMP on same date without any error

reported_bugs.issue: No way to edit or delete purchase entries in the ledger view
reported_bugs.verification: Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons now appear in Actions column for Purchase type transactions. Edit opens form with pre-filled data, Delete shows ConfirmDialog.

bug_verification.verification_method: Backend pytest tests + Playwright UI testing
